name: s7g-sidecar
description: S7G Sidecar Distribution Agent — registers versions on ICP canister, resolves binaries via P2P, manages auto-updates

skills.name: Register Sidecar Version
skills.description: Register a new sidecar version on ICP canister with 32-byte discovery key and SHA256 hash

skills.name: Resolve Sidecar Binary
skills.description: Resolve sidecar binary from P2P network via Iroh relay or TCP fallback, verify SHA256

skills.name: Check Sidecar Status
skills.description: Query canister for latest sidecar version, active governors, and deployment state
